title: About | Your Name
description: A generic About page for the starter template.
heroTitle: Tell a clearer story about who you are
heroText: Use this page for background, values, goals, and the kind of work you want more of. It should help people understand you without asking them to read a long autobiography.

cards.title: Background
cards.text: Summarise the experiences, training, or transitions that shaped the way you work.

cards.title: Working style
cards.text: Explain how you think, communicate, and collaborate, especially if that affects the kind of roles or clients that fit you best.

cards.title: Direction
cards.text: Describe what you want more of next, whether that means roles, projects, consulting, writing, or a clearer public profile.
